title: hesperis fugax
intro: Hesperis fugax, also known as Dune Evening Primrose or Evening Star, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hesperis fugax include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by extracting the plant's active compounds through steam distillation or solvent extraction.
